name: inventory-reservation-system
description: Local-first inventory reservation with PostgreSQL, Redis guard, and premium ecommerce UI

scripts.docker:up: docker compose -f server/docker-compose.yml up -d --build && docker compose -f web-client/docker-compose.yml up -d --build
scripts.docker:down: docker compose -f web-client/docker-compose.yml down && docker compose -f server/docker-compose.yml down
scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w web-client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w web-client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w web-client
